title: Sloop (disambiguation)
content:
A '''sloop''' was normally a type of small ship. The term could refer to the following:

*[[sloop (warship)]] a type of [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]].
*[[sloop racer]], a type of recreational vehicle.
*[[Punworcca 116-class interstellar sloop/Legends|''Punworcca 116''-class interstellar sloop]], famous as the hull design of [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] [[Solar sailer/Legends|solar sailer]]

{{Disambig}}
